contract.goal: Port .claude/scripts/guild/whiteboard.ts (four subverbs: init, detect-round, append, read-state) to .claude/cli/verbs/guild/whiteboard.ts. Byte-equivalent behavior. Path resolved against ctx.cwd. Pure helpers (detectNextRound, formatRoundBlock, parseState) re-exported for unit testing. D3 of 5 in Phase 2.
acceptance_criteria: whiteboardVerb(rest, ctx) exported; subverb from rest[0], path from rest[1] resolved against ctx.cwd.
init: creates file with topical header; idempotent; creates parent dirs as needed.
detect-round: returns next round number on stdout.
append: reads JSON array from ctx.stdin, appends Round N block, emits Result JSON.
read-state: parses and returns rounds JSON.
All legacy error paths preserved with guild-whiteboard-error: prefix.
27 sibling tests pass (pure helpers + each subverb's happy and error paths).
rules_applied: Re-export pure helpers verbatim from legacy (diff-only carve-out).
WhiteboardError class for module-local validation flow.
disqualifiers: Change file-content shape (round block, header, Result JSON, parseState shape).

actions: Wrote .claude/cli/verbs/guild/whiteboard.ts (~265 lines, ports legacy with WhiteboardError class; subverb helpers renamed to <verb>Subverb pattern).
Registered 'whiteboard' in GUILD_VERBS and VERBS help registry.
Wrote whiteboard.test.ts (27 tests: 8 pure-helper unit tests + 19 verb tests adapted from legacy CLI tests).
Ran npm test: 38 files / 523 tests pass.
Spawned evaluator-contract-fit + evaluator-naming in parallel. Both approved.

notes_for_pr: Naming evaluator surfaced one observation (not a flag): Section and State as type exports are quite generic; could collide with other modules at the consumer surface. Preserved verbatim from legacy per diff-only carve-out; worth a future-cleanup note.

Path argument resolved against ctx.cwd in the verb (vs legacy script's reliance on process.cwd). Byte-equivalent for absolute paths; for relative paths, behavior matches when ctx.cwd == process.cwd (which is the dispatcher's default).
